title: Design a Service API for Payment Processing
scenario: Design a service API for payment processing, including endpoints for processing payments, retrieving payment history, and managing payment methods. The API should also include a feature to detect and prevent payment fraud. The output should be a well-structured code snippet with clear comments and documentation.
constraints: Must use a popular programming language (e.g. Python, Java, JavaScript)
Must use a payment gateway library (e.g. Stripe, PayPal)
Must include at least 4 API endpoints for payment processing

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the code snippet adhere to the given constraints?
Is the payment gateway correctly integrated and configured?
Is the code snippet well-structured and documented?
